---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the SPI project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Summary
What feature or improvement are you proposing?

### Motivation
Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

### Proposed implementation
Describe the expected behavior and any implementation ideas.

### Additional context
Add any other information, references, or examples.
